title: Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple
tagline: Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple (இன்னம்பூர் எழுத்தறிநாதேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in Innambur, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam, in Thanj
overview.description: Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple (இன்னம்பூர் எழுத்தறிநாதேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in Innambur, a village in the outskirts of Kumbakonam, in Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Ezhutharinathar and his consort Parvati as Nithya Kalyani. Ona Kantheeswarar is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam, the 275 temples revered in the canon. The temple has a five-tiered rajagopuram, the entrance tower and all the shrines are

topPlaces.name: Innambur
topPlaces.description: Innambur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.description: Valaiyapettai is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Swamimalai
topPlaces.description: Swamimalai is a panchayat town that is a suburb near Kumbakonam in Thanjavur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the banks of river Kaveri and is the site of the fourth of the six abodes of the Hindu deity Murugan (Kartikeya).

topPlaces.name: Kodeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kodeeswarar Temple (Tamil: : கொட்டையூர் கோடீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, located in Kottaiyur, a village on the western outskirts of Kumbakonam, in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Koteeswarar and His consort Parvathi as Pandhadu Nayaki.

topPlaces.name: Thiru Aadanoor Temple
topPlaces.description: The Thiru Aadanoor or the Andalakkum Aiyan Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Aadanoor, Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Olaipadi
topPlaces.description: Olaipadi is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The village is situated on the northern side four km from Swamimalai near Kumbakonam and one km northeast from Adhanur, one of the 108 Divyadesams, has a temple for Lord Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Swaminatha Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Swaminatha Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to god Murugan. It is located on the banks of a tributary of river Kaveri in Swamimalai near Kumbakonam, Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Innambur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Thimmakudi is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Valaiyapettai is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

Swamimalai is a panchayat town that is a suburb near Kumbakonam in Thanjavur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies on the banks of river Kaveri and is the site of the fourth of the six abodes of the Hindu deity Murugan (Kartikeya).

Kodeeswarar Temple (Tamil: : கொட்டையூர் கோடீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, located in Kottaiyur, a village on the western outskirts of Kumbakonam, in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Koteeswarar and His consort Parvathi as Pandhadu Nayaki.

The Thiru Aadanoor or the Andalakkum Aiyan Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Aadanoor, Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

Olaipadi is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The village is situated on the northern side four km from Swamimalai near Kumbakonam and one km northeast from Adhanur, one of the 108 Divyadesams, has a temple for Lord Vishnu.
Swaminatha Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to god Murugan. It is located on the banks of a tributary of river Kaveri in Swamimalai near Kumbakonam, Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (74 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Innambur Ezhutharinathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Innambur, Thimmakudi, Valaiyapettai, Swamimalai, Kodeeswarar Temple.
